content.en:
Ye Tian did not face the Silent Annihilation Clan above the Five Patterns, although his strength was comparable to the Five Patterns Silent Annihilation Clan, but he couldn't do it if he wanted to kill the Five Lines Silent Annihilation Clan.

Therefore, he directly attacked the Silence Annihilation Clan with five patterns, so that he could not only kill a batch of Silence Annihilation Clan, but also harvest some Silence Extinction treasures.

This time, he wanted to harvest a batch of Silent Destruction Treasures, which was the biggest goal.

At the same time, his copying talent continued to envelop the surrounding area, copying the talents of the Silent Annihilation.

In this way, the harvest can be maximized.

Rumble!!!!

A second-pattern Silent Annihilation Clan was strangled by Ye Tian with a golden silk ancestral technique, and Ye Tian collected the corpse.

The Annihilation here is different from the Annihilation who attacked the defense line, once the Annihilation attacked the defense line, they were not allowed to carry any resources, unless it was their own weapon.

This is also to prevent the Silent Annihilation from being robbed of its resources by the creatures of the Dark Forbidden Realm after they die in battle.

But now, this is the territory of the Silent Annihilation Clan, and their resources are all carried with them, so killing a Silent Annihilation Clan can obtain a certain amount of Annihilation treasures and resources, so Ye Tiancai is happy to kill the Annihilation Clan.

The other Peerless Domain Ancestors didn't seem to know the preciousness of the Silent Destruction Treasure, so they didn't have such thoughts.

Puff puff!!!

A Silent Annihilation Clan with a name of one or two patterns died under Ye Tian's Golden Silk Ancestral Technique.

And Ye Tian also continued to use the Void Annihilation Ancestor Technique, the speed was incomparably fast, crossing the territory of the Silent Annihilation Clan, constantly copying a large number of Silent Annihilation Clan's talents, and at the same time, he was also looking for weaker Silent Annihilation Clan to kill, and occasionally saving some of the Superior Domain Ancestors.

However, even so, there are still people who have fallen from the Peerless Domain Ancestor, and there are quite a few who have fallen.

Compared to the Silent Annihilation Clan, the number of Ancestors of the Upper Domain who have fallen can almost be counted.

Rumble!!!!!

A statue of the Seven-Striped Silence was killed, causing a chain reaction.

Next, a Seven-Pattern Silence Clan was killed.

I have to say that the life-saving ability of the Seven Patterns Silent Annihilation Clan is too poor, but the ancestor is not easy to kill.

Strictly speaking, the Ancestor is the perfect being, while the Silent Annihilation has a huge flaw.

Otherwise, the Ancestor has not fallen a single one so far, but the Seven Stripes Silent Annihilation Clan has fallen many times.

And the same is true of the Peerless Domain Ancestors, although many of the Peerless Domain Ancestors have been eroded by the power of annihilation and have been hit hard, but they just can't be killed.

On the contrary, the Silent Extinction Clan, once they receive the same injury, they will definitely die.

As time passed, Ye Tian copied too many of the Silent Annihilation Clan's talents.

After all, he can easily cross one territory after another, and basically staying in one territory for a second, he can copy all the talents of the Silent Annihilation in that territory.

And the other Superior Domain Ancestors didn't know that Ye Tian was copying the talent of the Silent Annihilation Clan, thinking that Ye Tian was supporting everywhere, so they didn't care much.

It didn't take long for all the territories to be patronized by Ye Tian, and he had almost copied all the talents of the Silent Annihilation Clan.

Next, he began to kill the Silent Annihilation with all his might, and even broke through the buildings of the Silent Annihilation Clan's territory to grab resources.

Although many Superior Domain Ancestors don't know the preciousness of the Silence Treasure and Resources, if they see it, they will also collect it, after all, the Ancestor still has the option to exchange for the Silence Treasure, so the Silence Treasure must be valuable, don't do it in vain.

Ten days!

One month!

One year!

Decade!

This battle lasted for a hundred years, and a large number of Silent Clans fell, and finally the ancestors were freed up.

Because, the ancestors almost wiped out the seven and eight lines.

As soon as these ancestors participated in the battlefield of the Six Patterns and below, it was almost a massacre.

In a short time, these Silent Clans were all wiped out.

Subsequently, the Ancestors began to collect the corpses of the Silencers, as well as to rob the resources of the Silencers' territory.

Ye Tian naturally couldn't rob the ancestors, but he also entered some small territories and began to collect the resources of annihilation.

Some of the Superior Domain Ancestors seemed to understand something, and they also joined the ranks of snatching resources.

Suddenly.

From the depths of the endless time and space, the voice of the Nine Patterns of Silence Annihilation came out: "Holy Ancestor, Ancestor of Destruction, you two are so deeply hidden, I am not reconciled to !!!"

With a bang.

The depths of the endless space-time seemed to have been shattered, and the Nine Lines of Silence was also killed.

Click!!

The Holy Ancestor and the Ancestor of Destruction walked out from the depths of time and space, a little embarrassed, but in good condition.

"The Nine Pattern Silent Annihilation Clan has been killed by the Holy Ancestor and the Destruction Ancestor, have they hidden their strength?"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Why did the Ancestor of Destruction and the Holy Ancestor hide their strength?

According to their strength, it is estimated that they can solve the troubles of the Silent Annihilation Clan a long time ago, why wait until today?

"Cut leeks?"

Ye Tian thought of this.

Maybe the ancestors also needed the Silent Annihilation Treasure, so they kept the Silent Annihilation Clan, anyway, the Silent Annihilation Clan was not a threat to them, even if they needed to guard here, where was the cultivation not cultivation?

Therefore, they have not destroyed the Silent Clan.

As for why he wanted to destroy the Silent Annihilation Clan now, I'm afraid that something happened that he didn't know.

"I'm afraid the ancestors all know the reason, but the Superior Domain Ancestors probably don't know, otherwise those Superior Domain Ancestors wouldn't be so afraid of the Silent Annihilation Clan! Even the Fire Pattern War Ancestor is afraid of the Silent Annihilation Clan, obviously the old Peerless Domain Ancestor like the Fire Pattern War Ancestor doesn't know either. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He could ask Zhan Zu, but Zhan Zu probably wouldn't tell him, otherwise such news would have leaked out a long time ago.

Now.

Many Peerless Domain Ancestors also sensed that something was wrong, but the Silent Annihilation Clan had been wiped out, what else could they say?

Questioning the ancestors, isn't that looking for death?

In short, they survived, and that was enough.

As for the fallen and lost Superior Domain Ancestors, they are basically none of the Superior Domain Ancestors who are not strong, and none of the truly powerful Superior Domain Ancestors have fallen, but some of them are very seriously injured.

"Let's all get out!"

The Ancestors spoke.

Immediately.

An unnamed Domain Ancestor found that the others had been moved out of this time and space by the Ancestors.

When Ye Tian came back to his senses, he found that he had appeared in the War Ancestor Realm, and the other non-superior domain ancestors in the War Ancestor Realm had also returned.

This time, none of the Superior Domain Ancestors of the War Ancestor fell, and the Unknown Domain Ancestors who fell from the Dark Sacred Domain basically belonged to those Holy Lands.

It is conceivable that the seventy-two holy places will be reshuffled this time.

But Ye Tian no longer pays attention to such small things.

At this moment, he returned to the Xuanxu Saint Realm as soon as possible, and wanted to send the Silent Destruction Treasures obtained in his hands to the hands of the main body, so that the main body could refine and improve its strength.

Once he refined those Silent Treasures, his strength would be terrifyingly enhanced.
